changelog:
QuickView pre-release v6.26.1.0

## What's Changed
* Update JP Table by @coolvitto in https://github.com/justnullname/QuickView/pull/227
* feat: Add custom color support for edge overflow indicators and fix UI scaling (#223)
* feat(print): implement real-time grayscale print preview (#220)
* fix(ui): resolve window jumping, UI scale clipping, and fixed zoom boundary issues (#144)
* fix: restore desktop foreground and keyboard focus on image exit (#226)
* fix: Implement MasterBackingStore MMF pooling and async GC pipeline(#221)

##  Special Thanks
* @coolvitto made their first contribution in https://github.com/justnullname/QuickView/pull/227

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/justnullname/QuickView/compare/v6.25.2.1...v6.26.1.0
